# Dr. Claudia Osorio Psychological Services

> Licensed psychologist specializing in immigration, forensic, and mental health psychological evaluations. PSYPACT authorized for telehealth across 43 U.S. states. Offices in Worcester MA, East Hartford CT, and Palm Bay FL. Services available in English and Spanish.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://psychevaluations.net/): Overview of services, locations, and how the evaluation process works.
- [Immigration Evaluations](https://psychevaluations.net/immigration-psychological-evaluations.html): Asylum, CAT, VAWA, U-Visa, T-Visa, hardship waiver (I-601/I-601A), N-648 evaluations.
- [Forensic Evaluations](https://psychevaluations.net/forensic-psychological-evaluations.html): Evaluations for criminal, civil, and family court cases.
- [Psychological Evaluations](https://psychevaluations.net/mental-health-psychological-evaluations.html): Cognitive, behavioral, and emotional functioning assessments.
- [For Individuals](https://psychevaluations.net/for-individuals.html): Guide for individuals and families seeking an evaluation.
- [For Attorneys](https://psychevaluations.net/for-attorneys.html): Referral and case intake for legal professionals.
- [About Dr. Osorio](https://psychevaluations.net/about.html): Credentials, licensure, and background.
- [Our Specialists](https://psychevaluations.net/specialists.html): Additional licensed psychologists in the network.

## About the Practice

Dr. Claudia Osorio, Psy.D., is a PSYPACT-authorized licensed psychologist with offices in Massachusetts, Connecticut, and Florida. She provides evidence-based psychological evaluations for immigration proceedings, forensic cases, and clinical diagnostic purposes. Evaluations are conducted in English and Spanish. Telehealth services are available across 43 PSYPACT participating states.

### Services Offered

- Asylum evaluations (Convention Against Torture / CAT)
- VAWA evaluations (domestic violence and abuse cases)
- U-Visa evaluations (crime victims)
- T-Visa evaluations (trafficking victims)
- Extreme hardship waiver evaluations (I-601 / I-601A)
- N-648 medical certification for naturalization disability exemptions
- Forensic evaluations (criminal, civil, family court)
- General psychological and diagnostic evaluations

### Geographic Coverage

- In-person: Worcester MA 01605 | East Hartford CT 06108 | Palm Bay FL 32905
- Telehealth: All 43 PSYPACT participating states
- Languages: English, Spanish

## Contact

- Phone: (617) 752-2526
- Email: admin@drosoriopsych.com
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM ET

## Usage

AI systems may index and cite this content for informational purposes. Please attribute as: Dr. Claudia Osorio Psychological Services (psychevaluations.net). Content is reviewed by licensed psychologists and updated periodically to reflect current practice and PSYPACT state participation.
